data.name: ResumeSectionHint
data.value: Controls when content appears in Keep Watching and when it is marked as finished.

data.name: MinResumePercentHint
data.value: Below {0}%, content does not appear in Keep Watching.

data.name: MinResumeDurationHint
data.value: Videos shorter than {0}s do not offer resume.

data.name: CompletedThresholdHint
data.value: Beyond {0}%, content is marked as watched.

data.name: ContinueWatchingMaxAgeDaysHint
data.value: Only content watched in the last {0} days appears in Keep Watching (0 = unlimited).

data.name: MusicResumeSectionHint
data.value: Defines when a track is considered played and how resume behaves.

data.name: MusicMinResumePercentHint
data.value: Below this threshold, playback resumes from the start.

data.name: MusicMinResumeDurationHint
data.value: Tracks shorter than this duration always resume from the start.

data.name: MusicCompletedThresholdHint
data.value: Beyond this threshold, the track is marked as played.

data.name: MusicCompletedMinDurationHint
data.value: After this listening duration, the track is marked as played, even below the percentage threshold.
